description: opium eyewear is a range of addictive sunglasses stylised for international fashions and incorporating impeccable quality standards.  Wear these opium sunglasses to look stylish while out and about in the sunshine.The glasses come in a fabric lined, hard case with branding on the front and a zip fastening, microfibre pouch included to protect the sunglasses.Lens width: 60 mmLens colour: Graduated brownFrame colour: Brown and goldWarranty: One yearOptimatrix lenses for superior impact protection, scratch resistance and distortion free visionUV protectionStylish acrylic frame with cut-out and gold detail on armsBranding on sidesFlexible hinges for FitFlexible rubber pads to hold the glasses in place, ensuring there is no friction with the skinCarePolish with the microfibre pouch to remove dustDo not put your sunglasses face down on a table or on heated areas like the dashboard of a carKeep in the original case in a dry place at a temperature between -10° C and +35° C
